description: Welcome home to this bright and spacious home in Mackenzie Estates. Offering 3 beds and 3 baths, this home is filled with natural light and thoughtfully designed for comfortable living. The open-concept main floor showcases soaring 10’ ceilings, expansive windows, a modern kitchen, and generous living and dining areas— Rare and desirable fenced yard off the kitchen, perfect for kids and pets! Upstairs, the generous primary suite features a walk-in closet and full ensuite, complimented by two additional spacious bedrooms, a 4-piece main bath, and convenient upper-level laundry. A massive side by side double garage provides exceptional storage and functionality, no car shuffling required! Ideally located close to transit, shopping, parks, and schools, you will love living here!
